prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Major Depressive Disorder
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 70.9 kg; Height 152.2 cm; BMI 30.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 252mg/dL; 9 months ago 219mg/dL; 6 months ago 170mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.7kg; 9 months ago 65.7kg; 6 months ago 66.9kg; 3 months ago 67.3kg; current 70.9kg), Height (12 months ago 152.2cm; 9 months ago 152.2cm; 6 months ago 152.2cm; 3 months ago 152.2cm; current 152.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 30.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 66U/L; 9 months ago 58U/L; 6 months ago 60U/L; 3 months ago 66U/L; current 64U/L), AST (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 53U/L; 6 months ago 55U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 52U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 78mg/g; 9 months ago 100mg/g; 6 months ago 98mg/g; 3 months ago 102mg/g; current 94mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 67mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 163mg/dL; 9 months ago 183mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 181mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
